case_title: JASMINE NEGRON-WAKEFIELD VS. MADONNA GEVARGIZ ET AL

docket_entries.description: DISMISSAL OF ENTIRE ACTION OF ALL PARTIES AND ALL CAUSES OF ACTION WITH PREJUDICE (TRANSACTION ID # 60137813)
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE OF MAR-14-2017 IS OFF CALENDAR. DISMISSAL ON FILE. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

PERSONAL INJURY/PROPERTY DAMAGE - VEHICLE RELATED, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF NEGRON-WAKEFIELD, JASMINE AN INDIVIDUAL AS TO DEFENDANT GEVARGIZ, MADONNA AN INDIVIDUAL BLUE VAN LEASING CORP., A CORPORATION DOES 1 TO 25, INCLUSIVE SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE SCHEDULED FOR DEC-21-2016 PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  SEP-19-2016 CASE MANAGEMENT STATEMENT DUE ON         NOV-28-2016

NOTICE AND ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF RECEIPT, SIGNED OCT-11-2016, SERVED SEP-21-2016 (TRANSACTION ID # 59697578) FILED BY PLAINTIFF NEGRON-WAKEFIELD, JASMINE AN INDIVIDUAL AS TO DEFENDANT BLUE VAN LEASING CORP., A CORPORATION

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR MAR-14-2017 IN DEPARTMENT 610 AT 10:30 AM FOR FAILURE TO FILE PROOF(S) OF SERVICE ON DEFENDANT(S) MADONNA GEVARGIZ; OBTAIN AN ANSWER(S) FROM, OR ENTER DEFAULT(S) AGAINST, DEFENDANT(S). THE FEB-01-2017 CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE IS OFF CALENDAR. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
